title: KamenRiderCompletionPlan
description: This is a Kamen Rider mod, where you can transform into a Kamen Rider.
body:
This is a module focused on adventure and tokusatsu.

In this module, you can collect materials and transform into your favorite Kamen Rider.

At night, monsters will appear to fight you. You should transform into the Kamen Rider(s) you currently have to defeat them, and obtain items to enhance your Kamen Rider.

Right now, this is just the beginning, so there may be many bugs. But don’t worry—we will fix them as soon as possible. Additionally, we will add more and more monsters/Kamen Riders in the future. Enjoy playing!
